_comment: 3x/day (06:00/12:00/21:00 Brussels, src/triggers/ai_manager.py's _CALL_CHECKPOINT_HOURS) world-news recap -- replaced the old batch-of-up-to-3-posts/8-checkpoint design entirely (2026-07-20). Each call decides ONE post (should_post/text/second_part), fired immediately if genuinely worth it -- no queue, no day/night pacing, since there's no batch to spread out anymore. max_calls_per_day matches the 3 checkpoints so every one can actually fire. World news (config/world_news.json) is the primary input; crypto/finance/AI (config/keywords.json, prices, the CryptoScope Oracle) are secondary, folded in only when genuinely notable -- see ai_manager_brain.py's prompt.
